mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO `${datatablename}`
`time`,
`id_device`,
`error`,
`low_alarm`,
`high_alarm`,
`Main_Ambient_Temp`, `Main_Module_Temp`, `Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Body_Temp`, `Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Irradiance`, `Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Supply_Voltage`, `Main_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp`, `Main_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance`, `Main_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage`, `Wind_Direction`, `Wind_Speed`, `Zone_Module_Temp`, `Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp`, `Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance`, `Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage`,
`nvm_irradiance`,
`nvm_temperature`,
`nvm_panel_temperature`,
#{time},
#{id_device},
#{error},
#{low_alarm},
#{high_alarm},
#{Main_Ambient_Temp}, #{Main_Module_Temp}, #{Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Body_Temp}, #{Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Irradiance}, #{Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Supply_Voltage}, #{Main_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp}, #{Main_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance}, #{Main_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage}, #{Wind_Direction}, #{Wind_Speed}, #{Zone_Module_Temp}, #{Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp}, #{Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance}, #{Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage},
#{nvm_irradiance},
#{nvm_temperature},
#{nvm_panel_temperature},
id_device = #{id_device},
`error` = #{error},
low_alarm = #{low_alarm},
high_alarm = #{high_alarm},
`Main_Ambient_Temp` = #{Main_Ambient_Temp}, `Main_Module_Temp` = #{Main_Module_Temp}, `Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Body_Temp` = #{Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Body_Temp}, `Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Irradiance` = #{Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Irradiance}, `Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Supply_Voltage` = #{Main_Pyra_Horizontal_Supply_Voltage}, `Main_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp` = #{Main_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp}, `Main_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance` = #{Main_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance}, `Main_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage` = #{Main_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage}, `Wind_Direction` = #{Wind_Direction}, `Wind_Speed` = #{Wind_Speed}, `Zone_Module_Temp` = #{Zone_Module_Temp}, `Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp` = #{Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Body_Temp}, `Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance` = #{Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Irradiance}, `Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage` = #{Zone_Pyra_Inclined_Supply_Voltage},
nvm_irradiance = #{nvm_irradiance},
`nvm_temperature` = #{nvm_temperature},
`nvm_panel_temperature` = #{nvm_panel_temperature},
